summary: BUG FIX VERIFIED: Assignment student links 'no online questions' PDF attachment bug is FIXED. Student assignment page now correctly displays PDF attachments with clickable download link. The fix involves: 1) New AssignmentFiles component that renders all attachments (including PDFs) using DOM injection approach to bypass Emergent visual editor caching. 2) Updated StudentAssignment.js to show 'Review the attached file(s) above' message instead of 'no online questions' when attachments exist. 3) Google Classroom share button correctly gated for assignments without questions.

minor.issue: React hydration warning: <span> cannot be child of <th>/<tbody>/<tr>/<td> - Emergent visual editor injects span wrappers that cause HTML validation warnings. Doesn't affect functionality.

critical_code_review_comments: AssignmentFiles.jsx: Uses DOM injection (useEffect + innerHTML) instead of React rendering - this is documented as workaround for Emergent visual editor caching issues in preview environment
AssignmentFiles.jsx lines 14-41: Creates clickable file cards with window.open('url', '_blank') for new tab opening
StudentAssignment.js lines 467-477: Correctly shows 'Review the attached file(s) above' when attachments exist but no questions
StudentAssignment.js line 396: AssignmentFiles component is rendered BEFORE questions section for proper visibility
Gradebook.js lines 1373-1403: Share buttons (Copy Link, Google Classroom) conditional on `assignment.questions?.length > 0 || assignment.attachments?.length > 0`
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF attachment bug fix verified. Test tokens: '348d67436aaa' (PDF attachment, 0 questions) now shows 'Assignment Files' section with PDF download. '2ae35432d130' (3 questions, no attachments) still works correctly with Submit button. Gradebook page loads successfully with correct share button visibility.

Student page with PDF attachment (token:.details: Assignment Files section visible with 'test_exam.pdf' file card. Shows PDF icon, filename, file size (0.9 KB), and 'Click to open' text. Blue styling for clickable area.

PDF file opens in new tab.details: onclick handler contains window.open('https://teacherhub-ux-fix.preview.emergentagent.com/api/files/file_0b3789911cdd.pdf', '_blank') - correctly opens in new tab

No-questions message with attachments.details: Shows 'Review the attached file(s) above. Your teacher may provide separate instructions for submission.' instead of old 'no online questions' message

Submit button hidden for 0-question assi.details: No Submit Assignment button shown on PDF-only assignment - correct behavior

Student page with questions (token: 2ae3.details: Shows 3 questions correctly: Q1 Multiple Choice (capital of France), Q2 True/False (sun is a star), Q3 Short Answer (largest ocean). Name/email inputs and Submit Assignment button visible.

Gradebook page loads.details: Assignments & Gradebook page loads with View Assignments button. Assignment List dialog shows AI and Manual assignments.

Google Classroom share button gating.details: 'Test Assignment for Edit' (0 questions, 0 attachments) shows only Edit/Delete buttons - NO share buttons. 'Math Test Chapter 5 (PDF)' (0 questions, 1 PDF) shows Copy Link, Google Classroom, Edit, Delete. Assignments with questions show full button set.

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: Assignment student links showing 'no online questions' even though the assignment has a PDF attachment. Root cause: old code explicitly filtered OUT PDF attachments from the student page.
fix_applied: 1. Created new AssignmentFiles.jsx component using DOM injection approach (useEffect + innerHTML) to bypass Emergent visual editor caching
2. Component renders all attachments including PDFs with data-testid attributes for testing
3. File cards have onclick='window.open(url, _blank)' for new tab opening
4. StudentAssignment.js updated to use AssignmentFiles component
5. No-questions message now checks for attachments and shows 'Review the attached file(s) above' if present
6. Gradebook.js share buttons correctly gated for assignments without questions
test_evidence: Screenshot shows Assignment Files section with test_exam.pdf visible on token 348d67436aaa
Message text verified: 'Review the attached file(s) above. Your teacher may provide separate instructions for submission.'
Token 2ae35432d130 shows 3 questions with Submit button - regression test passed
Gradebook Assignment List shows correct button visibility based on questions/attachments
